echo "=== Shard $SHARD_IDX: Download ==="
START_DL=$(date +%s)

# Auth
azcopy login --identity 2>/dev/null || echo "azcopy login warning"

azcopy cp "https://stgelb.blob.core.windows.net/blast-db/10shards/core_nt_shard_00/core_nt_shard_00.manifest"               /tmp/manifest.txt --log-level=WARNING 2>/dev/null
VOLUMES=$(cat /tmp/manifest.txt)
echo "Volumes: $VOLUMES"

for VOL in $VOLUMES; do
    echo "  Downloading $VOL..."
    for EXT in nsq nhr nin nnd nni nog nos not; do
        azcopy cp "https://stgelb.blob.core.windows.net/blast-db/core_nt/${VOL}.${EXT}" "${DB_DIR}/${VOL}.${EXT}"                       --block-size-mb=256 --log-level=ERROR 2>/dev/null || true
    done
done

# (bypasses .nal alias file entirely)
VOLPATHS=""
for VOL in $VOLUMES; do
    [ -n "$VOLPATHS" ] && VOLPATHS="$VOLPATHS "
    VOLPATHS="${VOLPATHS}${DB_DIR}/${VOL}"
done
echo "Volume paths: $VOLPATHS"

# Download taxonomy support files
# core_nt.ndb (6.5 GB), .ntf (185 MB), .nto (487 MB) + taxdb
for F in taxdb.btd taxdb.bti core_nt.ndb core_nt.ntf core_nt.nto; do
    echo "  Downloading $F..."
    azcopy cp "https://stgelb.blob.core.windows.net/blast-db/core_nt/${F}" "${DB_DIR}/${F}"                   --block-size-mb=256 --log-level=ERROR 2>/dev/null || true

azcopy cp "https://stgelb.blob.core.windows.net/queries/pathogen-10.fa" "${QUERY_DIR}/query.fa"               --log-level=WARNING 2>/dev/null
echo "Query: $(grep -c '^>' ${QUERY_DIR}/query.fa) sequences"

echo "=== Shard $SHARD_IDX: BLAST ==="
START_BL=$(date +%s)

# Write timing summary
echo "{\"shard\":0,\"download_sec\":${DL_TIME},\"blast_sec\":${BL_TIME},\"hits\":${HITS}}"               > "${RESULTS_DIR}/timing.json"
